title: Kanban column view by DATE (not only status!)

posts.author: grant.visagie (Grant Visagie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Context: I’m a heavyweight UI/UX dev, I have a magic feature proposal!

In the kanban view, currently, you can only have status as a column.

If we could have the date as a column, you would essentially have Kanban “day-to-view” AND “week-to-view” all-in-one. I developed this workflow in trello (which is essentially a kanban only platform) and it is MAGIC.

This would negate my need to use trello ever again, and create a whole new workflow for monday.com!

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

We recently added the ability to group by date and timeline columns in our app - Multi Board Kanban

image1621×760 92.3 KB

You can choose to group the time intervals by - Daily, Weekly, Bi-Weekly ( for sprints ), Monthly or Annual. This also supports drag and drop to update the date or timeline values.
